message:
feat(security): expand fleet immune protocol, governance mechanisms, and security epoch modules

Fleet Immune Protocol (fleet_immune_protocol.rs, +623 lines):
- Add comprehensive test enrichment: MessageSignature serde roundtrips,
  ProtocolVersion ordering/compatibility/display, HeartbeatLiveness
  edge cases, QuarantineVote consensus threshold tests
- Validate protocol version compatibility semantics (same major,
  higher minor reader can consume lower minor writer)

Governance Mechanism (governance_mechanism.rs, +226 lines):
- Expand governance vote aggregation and quorum calculation tests
- Add serde roundtrip coverage for all governance event types
- Test policy enforcement boundary conditions

Security Epoch (security_epoch.rs, +282 lines):
- Add epoch transition validation tests: monotonicity, regression
  detection, boundary rollover behavior
- Test epoch-keyed cache invalidation semantics

Evidence Contract (evidence_contract.rs, +164 lines):
- Add contract verification tests: signature validation, chain of
  custody, tamper detection, expiration semantics

Trust Economics (trust_economics.rs, +81 lines):
- Expand trust score calculation edge cases and decay tests

Supporting modules:
- governance_hooks.rs: Expand hook registration and lifecycle tests
- policy_theorem_compiler.rs: Add theorem compilation edge cases
- fleet_convergence.rs, policy_checkpoint.rs, proof_schema.rs,
  ifc_artifacts.rs: Minor test additions and serde coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
